game_name: Space Quest III: The Pirates of Pestulon

voice_sample.description: Digitized audio: Roger saying 'Where am I?' during introduction

audio_identity.overall_style: Early digital audio with synthesized music and digitized voice samples
distinctive_elements: Mix of synthesized and sampled audio
Folk song variation (Astro Chicken theme based on traditional Chicken Reel)

notes: Limited musical documentation available. Astro Chicken theme is the only specifically named track. Digitized audio sampling available on Tandy, Amiga, and Macintosh versions; IBM PC Sound Blaster users affected by driver issue. Exact tempo, key signatures, and chord progressions not documented.
